test_inventory.notes: test/scenarios/ directory still absent (same as prior run). Patrol E2E suite is NEW (D7 requirement recently added). integration_test/ files have analyzer errors that need fixing.

Layer 1: SessionOrchestrator simulation branch > every strategy has a non-empty simulationDescription

gaps: AppDefaults / ModeOverrides — not in property suite
StealthConfig / GpsLoggingConfig — not in property suite
DisarmTrigger variants — not explicitly in property suite
N is small (5-100 depending on type), not the 200 targeted by TEST-120

FakeCallConfig_callerName_null_coercion.note: Test still locks coercion to 'Mom'; phase-14 flagged this as a bug to decide. Still unresolved.

patrol_e2e_status.d7_requirement_met: Partially — 3 Patrol flows exist (walk, date, distress) + app_test.dart
patrol_e2e_status.fix_summary: Use `pumpAndSettle(duration: const Duration(seconds: N))` rather than positional Duration arg. walk_mode_flow_test.dart was already migrated.
patrol_e2e_status.physical_device_runs: Unknown — not executed on device in this verification

evidence: All widget-driven integration tests use FakeAudioService / FakeMessagingService / FakePhoneService / FakeNotificationService / FakeVibrationService from lib/services/fakes/
db_round_trip_test uses NativeDatabase.memory() — in-memory Drift, never touches disk
cross_feature_test uses in-memory repository subclasses + ProviderContainer overrides — never hits Drift
FixedRandom is used consistently to eliminate jitter nondeterminism (per D-TEST-1)
fake_async.fakeAsync() wraps all timer-driven tests — no wall-clock sleeps
All platform-channel dependent services are stubbed (IncomingCall, Geofence, BatteryMonitor, DeviceState, Location, HardwareButton)
concerns: Layer 2 tests in simulation_defense_test.dart instantiate real AudioService, PhoneService, VibrationService and call them with isSimulation:true. They expect short-circuit behavior; if the real impl ever tries to resolve a MethodChannel before the short-circuit check, these tests could fail with MissingPluginException on CI.

findings.issue: flutter analyze --fatal-infos fails with 3 errors in Patrol D7 tests (date_mode_flow_test.dart, distress_flow_test.dart). Universal gate is red.
findings.suggested_fix: Replace positional Duration with `duration:` named parameter in all pumpAndSettle calls in the two affected files. walk_mode_flow_test.dart is already fixed.

findings.issue: P0-6 (wrong-PIN threshold) still asserts WEAKLY — prior run's upgrade-recommendation not yet applied. cross_feature_test.dart only checks 'ws is not null' after threshold crossing; no assertion that engine is in distress chain or that messaging.calls fired.
findings.suggested_fix: Supply at least one contact in the fixture, then assert fx.messaging.calls is non-empty OR engine is in distress chain phase after the async delay.

findings.issue: No test/regression/settings_controller_test.dart directly exercising the D-CONTROLLER-1 race (OnboardingScreen.completeOnboarding persisting empty defaults over seeded state). Still open from prior run.
FakeCallConfig null-callerName coercion test still locks 'Mom' as correct behavior. phase-14 flagged this as a bug — decision still needed.
findings.suggested_fix: Either fix fromJson to preserve null (and update test) or document the intentional coercion in a D-ID.

findings.issue: P0-7 incoming call pause test still uses Future.delayed instead of fakeAsync. Not deterministic.
findings.suggested_fix: Wrap in fakeAsync and use async.elapse.

findings.issue: session_scenarios_test 'disguised reminder triggers notification on step start' still does not assert a notification was shown — only stepStarted event count.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a showDisguisedReminder call list on FakeNotificationService.

findings.issue: P0-9 Layer 4 structural check is still source-string grep — not a transitive-import check.
Property suite (TEST-120) N-count still small (5-100); 10 of ~25 models still missing.
findings.suggested_fix: Extend to 200 iterations per type; add the 10 missing model types.

findings.issue: Patrol E2E exists but has NOT been run on physical devices. D7 spec requires device-matrix execution.
findings.suggested_fix: After fixing the 3 analyzer errors, run patrol test on Pixel + Samsung + iOS 17 per plan Phase 16 checklist items 10-17.

open_questions: Should Patrol E2E device-matrix execution be a ship gate, or can we ship with the 3 flows passing on a simulator and defer physical-device verification?
FakeCallConfig null-callerName coercion: still needs a decision (fix-or-document-with-D-ID).
Should the D7 Patrol flows assert state-machine-level outcomes (e.g., 'session entered distress phase'), or is UI-label detection sufficient?
